title: My Portfolio
description: A portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

title: University Student Colaboration Portal
description: Student platform for sharing academic materials with authentication and contribution tracking. Includes admin panel for user management, moderation, spam control, and analytics. Added analytics dashboard for platform insights and activity monitoring.

title: This is Commune
description: this is a react based developer friendly side.user's can create a profile for there blogs, post, merketplace.

title: Post Your Startup
description: A platform to share your startup journey, ideas, and experiences with the community.

title: Learn Data Structures and Algorithms
description: A comprehensive guide to understanding data structures and algorithms in C and C++.

title: Image Processing with OpenCV and gemeni AI
description: A project that combines OpenCV and gemeni AI for advanced image processing tasks.

title: Figma Design System
description: A comprehensive design system built with Figma to streamline the design process.

title: Basic WebGPU Triangle
description: A minimal WebGPU project rendering a basic triangle to understand GPU pipelines, shaders, buffers, and the WebGPU rendering flow.

title: 2D Shooting Game with WebGPU
description: A 2D shooting game built with WebGPU and TypeScript to explore modern GPU architecture, rendering pipelines, shaders, collision detection, and real-time game loops.

title: University Shuttle Bus – Real-Time Tracking & Chat
description: A real-time university shuttle bus tracking system with live location sharing, ETA calculation, and route-based chat using Next.js, Socket.IO, and Leaflet.
